'''l??''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:river|river]]". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-?-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:river|river]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfth|la?ïf?ïfth]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfj|la?ïf?ïfj]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfsh|la?ïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf|la?ïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf?ïfth|la?ïf?ïf?ïfth]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf?ïfj|la?ïf?ïf?ïfj]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf?ïfsh|la?ïf?ïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf?ïf|la?ïf?ïf?ïf]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfth|la?ïf?ïfth]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfj|la?ïf?ïfj]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfsh|la?ïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïf|la?ïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfïf|la?ïf?ïfïfïf]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfïf|la?ïf?ïfïfïf]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfïf|la?ïf?ïfïfïf]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfïf|la?ïf?ïfïfïf]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfn|la?ïf?ïfïfn]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfn|la?ïf?ïfïfn]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfn|la?ïf?ïfïfn]] || [[word:la?ïf?ïfïfn|la?ïf?ïfïfn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
